## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Logic and GrowthX for content strategy and creation.](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Logic is seeking a head of growth and considering content marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation with human expertise, starting with a 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by ongoing execution ($12K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Logic's current content efforts are time-consuming; GrowthX's process could potentially streamline this](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Timing may be a concern; Logic is still developing their self-serve onboarding and landing page](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)

## Topics

### Logic's Current Situation and Needs

  - [6-person engineering team, raised seed round in March 2022](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Doing \~250K tasks/month for dozen customers](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Seeking head of growth (2-month search so far)](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [Need better self-serve story and onboarding before driving traffic](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Found success with content, but it's time-consuming to produce](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Process

  - [AI + human approach for scaling content creation](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K) to build foundation](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Deliverables: persona development, writing guidelines, content calibration](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Ongoing execution starts at $12K/month](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [Can handle technical content and pass medical/legal reviews](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [Flexible on engagement terms for earlier-stage companies](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)

### Content Strategy and Creation Process

  - [Deep dive into client's business, customers, and technical aspects](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [Develop detailed personas and writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Create content examples and calibrate voice/tone](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [Use AI-ready templates and workflows for efficient production](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Continuous refinement of strategy as business evolves](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

### Potential Collaboration Considerations

  - [Timing: Logic may benefit from having head of growth in place first](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [Technical content: GrowthX can handle complex, technical topics](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [AI usage: Both companies prioritize avoiding "AI-generated" feel in content](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Flexibility: GrowthX can customize engagement based on Logic's needs](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to send meeting recording and additional info to Steve](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting to dive deeper into GrowthX's platform and processes](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Steve to consider timing and resource allocation for potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Explore possibility of starting with strategy sprint to lay groundwork for future collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/WfsNVrhALi5BaDp85znVS2_J5LG58nFL?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
